title: gilia matthewsii
intro: Gilia matthewsii, also known as Matthews' gilia or purple gilia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. Traditionally, Gilia matthewsii has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing stress levels due to its adaptogenic properties. Herbal preparations of Gilia matthewsii include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
